% Generated by plot_hnph_preprint_figures.py; do not edit manually.
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionOne}{Operational HNPH task. An oracle current-stage annotation and causal EEG history precede a guard interval and four future lead bands. The five-way leave-one-rater-out target is scored against the best eligible nuisance comparator. This is a task schematic, not a performance result.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionTwo}{Leakage and label contract. People are split before any fitted transform; input and outcome supports are disjoint in physical time; and the held-out target rater never contributes to the consensus target.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionThree}{Baseline-first study flow. DOD-H source qualification and development gates precede model-family freeze; DOD-O remains sealed until then. Every stage is UNRUN in this protocol release.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionFour}{Possible protocol outcomes. A supported frontier, bounded or null result, failed calibration or control, and invalid execution are distinct outcomes. Symbolic bands encode decisions, not observed effects.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionFive}{Descriptive Sleep-EDF trace, spectrogram, and single-label hypnogram from record SC4002E0. The origin package reports 100 Hz sampling and hash-bound PSG/hypnogram sources. This transport illustration is not independently source-qualified under HNPH v0.4 and cannot enable a repeated-rater construct-validity or empirical frontier claim.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionSix}{Raw-to-evidence lineage. Hash-bound local sources feed qualification, person-first manifests, causal targets, frozen comparisons, and paired JSON/Markdown evidence; raw neural samples remain outside git.}
\newcommand{\HNPHFigureCaptionSeven}{Proper-score decomposition and observation-contraction ceiling. The conditional-information identity is an oracle statement, while contraction is assumption-dependent; neither is presented as a novel theorem.}
